header.title: About Nimbus Tech
header.subtitle: We're on a mission to make world-class cloud infrastructure accessible to every team.

intro.title: Engineering a simpler cloud
intro.body: Nimbus Tech started with a simple frustration: building great products is hard enough without fighting your infrastructure. So we set out to create a platform that handles the complexity for you — reliable, secure, and genuinely pleasant to use. Today, teams in over 35 regions run their most important workloads on Nimbus.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Give every team the power of enterprise-grade infrastructure, without the enterprise-grade complexity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where shipping software is fast, safe, and accessible to anyone with an idea.

items.title: Customer obsession
items.desc: Every decision starts with the people who build on us.

items.title: Radical simplicity
items.desc: We remove complexity so you can focus on what matters.

items.title: Earned trust
items.desc: Security and reliability are promises, not features.

items.title: Keep improving
items.desc: We ship better every single day.

items.title: Founded
items.desc: Three engineers set out to fix cloud complexity.

items.title: Series A
items.desc: Raised funding to expand the platform globally.

items.title: 35 regions
items.desc: Reached customers across six continents.

items.title: 200+ customers
items.desc: Trusted by teams from startups to enterprises.

header.title: Services
header.subtitle: A full-stack platform with everything you need to build, run, and scale.

items.title: Cloud Hosting
items.desc: Reliable, auto-scaling compute that grows with your traffic. Deploy in seconds and never worry about capacity again.

items.title: Managed Databases
items.desc: Fully managed SQL and NoSQL databases with automated backups, replication, and effortless scaling.

items.title: DevOps Automation
items.desc: Built-in CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code so your team ships faster and safer.

items.title: Observability
items.desc: Unified metrics, logs, and traces with smart alerts so you catch issues before your users do.

items.title: Edge Delivery
items.desc: Cache and serve content from hundreds of edge locations for instant loads anywhere on earth.

items.title: Identity & Access
items.desc: Secure your platform with single sign-on, role-based access control, and full audit logging.

header.title: Solutions
header.subtitle: Purpose-built solutions for the industries shaping tomorrow.

items.title: Startups
items.desc: Move fast without technical debt. Launch your MVP today and scale to millions of users without re-architecting — all on infrastructure that grows with you.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Keep your storefront fast and online, even during your biggest sales. Auto-scaling and global delivery protect both your revenue and your customers.

items.title: Fintech
items.desc: Build financial products on infrastructure designed for trust. Compliance-ready controls, encryption everywhere, and audit-grade logging come standard.

items.title: AI & Data
items.desc: Train, deploy, and serve machine learning models on high-performance compute with the storage and pipelines your data team needs.
